scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "blue,yellow,green" --names "docker,backend,web" "npm run docker:up" "npm run backend:wait" "npm run web"
scripts.backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.backend:wait: npm run wait:db && npm run backend
scripts.logs: concurrently --kill-others --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,green" --names "docker,backend,web" "npm run logs:docker" "npm run logs:backend" "npm run logs:web"
scripts.logs:backend: tail -f logs/backend.log 2>/dev/null || echo 'Backend log file not found. Start backend first with: make backend'
scripts.logs:web: tail -f logs/web.log 2>/dev/null || echo 'Web log file not found. Start web first with: make web'
